titleStmt.title: SII 15.178: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 178. (B.K. No. 24 of 1926-27.) NĀGĀVI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar in the Kōḍi Basavaṇṇa temple.

This inscription refers itself to the reign of Siṅghaṇa and is dated Śōbhakṛit, Pushya ba. amāvāsye, Monday, Saṅkramaṇa. This date corresponds to 1244 A.D., January 11. No Saṅkramaṇa occurred this day.

It records that the 104 Mahājanas of the place made a gift of land to the god Kōḍi Mahābala after washing the feet of Rājaguru Kēdāradēva. The name of the place which is referred to as agrahāra is lost. But it must evidently be Nāgāvi itself. The epigraph is partly damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabdaṁ dvārāvatīpuravarādhīsvaraṁ
kuḷakamaḷa kaḷikāvikāsabhāskaraṁ suvarṇnagaruḍadhvajaṁ yā
davanārāyaṇa bhujabaḷa pravuḍha pratāpacakravartti śrī
vīra siṁhaṇarā nārāyaṇaṁ parama visvāsi dēvayyanāya
svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhāna japasa
mādhiśīḷaguṇasaṁpaṁnaruṁ yavupāsanāgni hōtra dvijaguru
dēvatāpūjātatpararuṁ mārttaṁḍōjvaḷakīrttiyutaruṁ yajanayā
jana yadhyayanayadhyāpana dānapratigrahaṣaṭukarmmaniyataruṁ ru
gya viditavēdārtthavidyāpāḷaka(pāraga)ruṁ yahita
pakṣakṣayarkaliyugagāṁgēyarpparamaparōpakāriga
grāmanāmōtsaraṇa vayiṣṇavagītimanōha
raruṁ sahōdararuṁ duṣṭanigṛhasiṣṭajanāsrayaruṁ kāma
krōdhalōbhavivarjjitaruṁ dvātriṁsatsamayarggāma
saraṇāgatavajrapaṁjararuṁ samastaguṇavisēsōṁnatarumappa śrī
madanādiyagrahāraṁ ratnāgara vūroḍeya pramukha
yaśēṣa mahājana nūṟanālvaru sōbhakritu saṁvatsarada pu
ṣya bahuḷadamavāsa sōmavāra vitīpāta saṁkramāṇa daṁdu śrī
madrājaguru kēdāradēvara pādaprakṣālanaṁ māḍi dhārāpū
rbbakavāgi śrī kōḍiya mahābaḷadēvargge śrīkāryya śrī
mānyanāgi keṁcare baru ḍeyana tōṭadiṁ hattire mūḍalu lo
kkiguṁḍiya dāriyiṁ baḍagalu koṭṭa tōṭa 1 svadattaṁ vā
paradattaṁ vā yō hvarēti vasuṁdharā saṣṭivaruṣasaha
srāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .
Digital edition of SII 15.178 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
